title: How to Build a Men’s Summer Capsule Wardrobe
excerpt: A summer capsule wardrobe is a small group of clothes that work together repeatedly without making every outfit look identical. The goal is to reduce daily friction and build outfits that suit your real routine.

title: A Simple Summer Skincare Routine for Men
excerpt: A practical summer skincare routine built around gentle cleansing, suitable moisturising and reliable sun protection without unnecessary products.

title: How to Exercise Safely in Hot Weather
excerpt: Learn how to adjust exercise timing, intensity, clothing, hydration and expectations when training in hot or humid conditions.
